title: Revamped Phantoms
body:
# Revamped Phantoms

*Have you ever worried that the "Monster of the Night Skies" just isn't scary enough? Worry no more!*

Phantoms are modified to become much more dangerous. Changes include:

* Phantoms will carry off their prey, and then drop them from a height.
* Phantoms will target livestock and villagers in addition to players (though cats still scare them away, and putting your pets on a lead will keep them safe).
* Phantoms can stun their prey with their terrifying call, making it much harder for the player to attack them.
* Phantoms are better at pursuing flying players.
* Phantoms will rarely spawn even on nights when the player is well rested.

## Images:
![Phantom carrying off a cow](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/429/935/2022-02-01_13.png "Phantom Carrying a Cow")
A phantom carrying off a cow.
